title: Fix Mike Strickland BASE login on pipeshare.live
description:
Mike Strickland (platform operator) is restored as a BASE user on pipeshare.live. SaaS tenant membership and mis-provisioned portal scope no longer block his sign-in on the private base server.

Who is affected: Mike and any future platform operators accidentally linked to a SaaS tenant row.
changeLog: Platform operator bypass on pipeshare.live login environment check.
Startup migration clears SaaS tenant owner/membership rows for Mike.
Restores portal-users scope when mis-provisioned as tenant-*.
BASE vs SAAS tier labels corrected in session and admin UI.
